architectureNotes: Canvas wrapper class is .shortLongAnsComponent; settings panel id is #shortLongAns-setting (title 'Question Answer').
Answer types Short/Long/RTE — RTE and Keyboard-Type (Basic/Advance) radios are gated by TOCFlag.
Outline/Fill radios and colour picker render only when styleSelected == 'style1'.

Enable Keyboard checkbox is disabled unless a subject-level special language (FRA/ESP/GER) is selected — so all special-keyboard language QC cases are deferred (cannot set subject language from the authoring DOM).
Preview/Reader typing, submit, copy lifecycle, and multipart cases require flows outside the authoring DOM and are deferred.
